evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long is enabled and valid-0DTE routed but produced zero trades, while charm-wall and charm-pin option-aware profiles remain efficient. This suggests call-wall gates may be too strict rather than the concept being disproven.
name: Call Wall Acceptance Isolated Sample Builder
risk: Looser DEX and call-volume thresholds may admit call-wall chop or cannibalize stronger charm/pullback winners without adding net PnL.
trigger: VALID_0DTE call-wall acceptance context with moderate net DEX, positive forward DEX, call-volume expansion, and sustained strike acceptance.
validation_metric: At least 3 standalone call_wall_acceptance_long trades, positive profile PnL, profile PnL/exposure >=150, total net profit >=98% of run_029, slow_12h remains 0, and worst MAE no worse than the leader band.
